title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. longistyla
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. longistyla, also known as the Rosa dumetorum longistyla, is a subvariety of a hybrid rose plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. longistyla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used as a topical cream or ointment for skin issues.
